nasb.text: Now it came about as soon as the kingdom was firmly in his grasp, that he killed his servants who had slain his father the king.

esv.text: And as soon as the royal power was firmly his, he killed his servants who had struck down the king his father.

cnv.text: 他鞏固了王位以後，就把擊殺他父王的臣僕殺了。

ccb.text: 他巩固了王位后，立即处死了杀他父王的臣仆，
